publishedAbstract: - OCS block will not get installed properly and will be nonfunctioning with latest OCP Ansible installer 3.11.51 and 3.11.59- After gluster-pod restarts, the brick devices (LVs) are missing.
publishedTitle: OCS block and LV mount issues with latest OCP Installer 3.11.51 and OCP 3.11.59
